rationale: The system shall provide a frontâ€‘facing camera that looks straight down to give an overview of the user's hands, and a foldable camera arm beneath the boom that supplies a threeâ€‘dimensional view displayed on a twoâ€‘dimensional screen.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 5 (participant) | FRET confidence: medium
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy dual_camera_setup_provided

_fret_decomposition.response_description: The system provides a front-facing downward camera for hand overview and a foldable camera arm under the boom for 3D view rendering on a 2D screen.

rationale: The system shall respond to an emergency stop button press within one tenth of a second.
comments: Type: non-functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 29 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: when emergency_stop_pressed the system shall within 0.1 seconds satisfy emergency_stop_response_delivered

_fret_decomposition.response_description: The system has responded to the emergency stop button press.

rationale: The system shall allow predefined arm movements to be stored in files and enable the boom to be moved to a predetermined position by pressing a button on the computer.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 31 (participant) | FRET confidence: medium
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy arm_movement_file_storage and enable boom_movement_to_preset

_fret_decomposition.response_description: Predefined arm movements can be stored in files and the boom can be moved to a predetermined position via a button press on the computer.

rationale: The system shall provide assistance during a tricky manoeuvre, such as placing an object between a series of tiles.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 33 (participant) | FRET confidence: medium
fulltext: when tricky_manoeuvre_in_progress the system shall immediately satisfy assistance_provided

_fret_decomposition.response_description: The system provides assistance during a complex manoeuvre, such as placing an object between tiles.

rationale: The system shall provide a Bolt Runner constraint feature that allows tightening a bolt regardless of orientation.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 35 (participant) | FRET confidence: medium
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy bolt_runner_constraint_feature_available

_fret_decomposition.response_description: The Bolt Runner constraint feature is available to tighten a bolt regardless of orientation.

rationale: The system shall detect a delay of at least one millisecond and generate a notification indicating that operation should be paused for one minute.
comments: Type: non-functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 41 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: when delay_at_least_one_millisecond the system shall immediately satisfy pause_operation_notification_generated

_fret_decomposition.response_description: A notification is generated indicating that the operation should be paused for one minute.

rationale: The system shall break pre-programmed moves into stages, such as 20-degree increments, to allow the operator to monitor progress.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 45 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy move_stage_decomposition

_fret_decomposition.response_description: Pre-programmed moves are broken into stages (e.g., 20-degree increments) to enable operator monitoring of progress.

rationale: The system shall support high refresh rates even when operating at lower resolutions.
comments: Type: non-functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 61 (participant) | FRET confidence: medium
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy high_refresh_rate_support

_fret_decomposition.response_description: The system maintains support for high refresh rates regardless of resolution settings.

rationale: The system shall provide a ghost mode that indicates where the machine is moving.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 65 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy ghost_mode_indicates_machine_movement

_fret_decomposition.response_description: The ghost mode visually indicates the path or position where the machine is moving.

rationale: The system shall allow users to preprogram virtual walls that block movement into restricted areas.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 67 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy preprogrammable_virtual_walls

_fret_decomposition.response_description: Users can preprogram virtual walls to block movement into restricted areas.

rationale: The system shall include a camera with an integrated light to create shadows for 3D spatial perception.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 75 (participant) | FRET confidence: high
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy camera_with_shadow_illumination

_fret_decomposition.response_description: The system includes a camera equipped with an integrated light source to produce shadows for enabling 3D spatial perception.

rationale: The system shall allow setting force ratios on the arms to restrict heavy loads to be picked up only in specified positions.
comments: Type: functional | Priority: preferred | Source: Turn 79 (participant) | FRET confidence: medium
fulltext: the system shall always satisfy force_ratio_setting_enabled

_fret_decomposition.response_description: It is possible to set force ratios on the arms to restrict heavy loads to only be picked up in specified positions.
